dashboard.subtitle: Continue where you left off and improve your English.

landing.title: Speak English Fluently
landing.subtitle: Easily and Fast
landing.desc: Throw away your grammar books! Learn English naturally like native speakers do. The Effortless English system helps you understand native speech instantly and speak automatically.
landing.method_desc: Instead of analyzing grammar, we use Mini-Story listening lessons to train your brain to think in natural English automatically.

metadata.description: Learn English naturally with Tai Anh. The method of deep listening — speaking correctly — thinking in English, without studying grammar rules first.
metadata.og_description: Learn English naturally and practically with Tai Anh. The method of deep listening — speaking correctly — thinking in English.
